prompt: Strictly front-facing orthographic view of a 3D folded map icon with a location pin. The map is tri-folded into 3 vertical sections. A large 3D tear-drop shaped location pin with a hole is centered on the map, pointing to a glowing route. Isolated object only, no pedestal, no display stand, no floor shadow. Minimalist 3D Onyx style: dark matte plastic base, frosted glass elements, soft glowing neon green and cyan route lines and pin. Centered composition, high contrast, solid white background.
